The '''''Bezil''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] used by [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] forces during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces encountered the ''Bezil'' as [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] [[Starship/Legends|starships]] staged a [[First Battle of the Sepan system|raid]] on the Ripolus supply convoy [[Asbo]]. The shuttle, along with ''[[Bredis]]'' and ''[[Gamu]]'', aided Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in pushing back the Dimok attackers.

After the attack was routed, Imperial [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] inspected the convoy, discovering Imperial munitions likely sold by [[Admiral]] [[Harkov]] who was, ironically enough, leading the [[Sepan campaign|campaign]] to end the civil war. The shuttle was ultimately destroyed, either by Dimok or Imperial forces.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Bezil'' appears in the video game [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]. If it survives and the player inspects the convoy, the shuttle will turn hostile and has to be destroyed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
